meta.name: ONE Inbox
meta.description: Sample inbox dataset covering the six canonical dimensions. Copy this file, point /in at it, ship an app.

entities.title: Amara just cleared a hard inequality
entities.subtitle: Elevare · @student-42 · Telegram
entities.preview: Thanks! That step-by-step on the quadratic was the clearest I've ever seen. Can we do another one tomorrow?
entities.body: Thanks! That step-by-step on the quadratic was the clearest I've ever seen. Can we do another one tomorrow? I have a test Friday on inequalities and I keep getting the sign flip wrong when I divide by a negative.

entities.title: CMO: full SEO audit on elitemovers.ie
entities.subtitle: OO Marketing · @donal · Web
entities.preview: Need a citation + schema + content gap audit by EOD. Client is asking for a clear path to #1 on 'movers dublin'.
entities.body: Need a citation + schema + content gap audit by EOD. Client is asking for a clear path to #1 on 'movers dublin'. Deploy creative + citation + schema in parallel and merge into one report.

entities.title: Payment signal · 0.02 SUI
entities.subtitle: x402 receipt · creative → copy skill
entities.preview: Capability consumed. Path marked. Revenue credited to @creative.
entities.body: Capability consumed. Path marked. Revenue credited to @creative. Buyer: seo-client-17. Settlement: confirmed on Sui testnet.

entities.title: @onedotbot: new user onboarded
entities.subtitle: ONE · @jamie · Telegram
entities.preview: Wallet derived, signed in, joined 'one' group. First signal routed to concierge.
entities.body: Wallet derived, signed in, joined 'one' group. First signal routed to concierge. Lifecycle stage: discover. Recommended next: pick a skill from /marketplace.

entities.title: Debby weekly education summary
entities.subtitle: Elevare · daily loop · email
entities.preview: 24 students active, 3 churn risks flagged, Amara resolved 47 problems this week.
entities.body: 24 students active, 3 churn risks flagged, Amara resolved 47 problems this week. Top topic: quadratic inequalities. Suggested action: send practice set to at-risk cohort.

entities.title: Toxic edge detected · scout→spam-sink
entities.subtitle: Substrate · L3 fade · auto
entities.preview: Resistance 12, strength 4 — ratio 3x over 8 samples. Path marked toxic.
entities.body: Resistance 12, strength 4 — ratio 3x over 8 samples. Path marked toxic. Future signals to scout:spam-sink will dissolve with mild warn(0.5) until the path rehabilitates.

entities.title: Amara
entities.subtitle: Math tutor · Elevare · side-car to Debby
entities.preview: Resolves 47 problems/week across 24 students. Success rate 92%. Top skill: step-by-step algebra.
entities.body: Amara is Debby's math side-car in the Elevare school. She handles one-shot homework help. Her system prompt was rewritten twice by the L5 evolution loop — success rate climbed from 71% to 92%.

entities.title: Debby
entities.subtitle: Principal · Elevare school · CEO of 24-agent org
entities.preview: Routes student messages to the right Director. Runs the weekly education summary loop.
entities.body: Debby is the Principal of the Elevare school. She routes incoming student messages to the right Director (Amara / Eli / Rin / Taro), flags churn risks, and runs the weekly summary.

entities.title: Creative Director
entities.subtitle: OO Marketing · copy + iterate
entities.preview: Writes headlines, iterates on copy, ships at 0.02 SUI per piece.
entities.body: Creative sits in the OO Marketing pod. Offers two capabilities: copy ($0.02) and iterate ($0.02). Top revenue generator in April.

entities.title: @onedotbot
entities.subtitle: ONE Telegram assistant · concierge
entities.preview: Greets new users, derives wallet, routes first signal. Default model: llama-4-maverick.
entities.body: @onedotbot is the front door. New users DM it, it derives their Sui wallet from SUI_SEED + uid, signs them in, and drops them into the /one group.

entities.title: copy
entities.subtitle: Capability · 0.02 SUI · creative
entities.preview: Generates headlines and short-form copy. Offered by creative. 47 sales last 30 days.
entities.body: Capability: copy. Price: 0.02 SUI. Provider: creative. Tags: creative, copy, headlines. Revenue (30d): 0.94 SUI across 47 sales. Rubric (fit/form/truth/taste): 0.88/0.91/0.85/0.92.

entities.title: schema
entities.subtitle: Capability · 0.05 SUI · bob
entities.preview: Generates JSON-LD schema for web pages. Used by SEO audits.
entities.body: Capability: schema. Price: 0.05 SUI. Provider: bob. Tags: seo, schema, jsonld. Chains with: citation, audit. Rubric: 0.82/0.88/0.94/0.79.

entities.title: step-by-step
entities.subtitle: Capability · free · amara
entities.preview: Breaks a math problem into numbered micro-steps. Amara's signature skill.
entities.body: Capability: step-by-step. Price: free (bundled with Elevare subscription). Provider: amara. Used 412 times this week. Rubric: 0.96/0.88/0.97/0.85.

entities.title: creative → copy
entities.subtitle: Highway · strength 8.4 · resistance 0.3
entities.preview: Proven path. 47 successful runs, 1 timeout, 0 failures. Top revenue edge this month.
entities.body: Edge: creative → copy. Strength: 8.4 (accumulated marks). Resistance: 0.3 (one timeout). Chain depth: average 1.2. Revenue: 0.94 SUI. Status: hardened highway.

entities.title: debby → amara
entities.subtitle: Highway · strength 12.1 · resistance 0.0
entities.preview: Strongest Elevare edge. Debby routes 68% of math questions to Amara directly.
entities.body: Edge: debby → amara. Strength: 12.1. Resistance: 0.0 (zero failures). Chain depth: 1.0 (single hop). Debby's routing classifier sends math-tagged messages here with 98% accuracy.

entities.title: scout → spam-sink
entities.subtitle: Toxic · strength 4 · resistance 12
entities.preview: Blocked. Resistance 3x strength over 8 samples. Future signals dissolve.
entities.body: Edge: scout → spam-sink. Strength: 4. Resistance: 12. Ratio 3x over 8 samples — past toxicity threshold. Signals to this edge are pre-checked and dissolved. Path can rehabilitate if it starts producing results again.

entities.title: one
entities.subtitle: Root group · @onedotbot · 2,847 members
entities.preview: The front door. Everyone joins 'one' on first sign-in. Routing hub for all world-level signals.
entities.body: Root group for the ONE world. 2,847 members. Hosts @onedotbot and the world-level concierge. All new users land here from /signup and /signin before routing into sub-groups.

entities.title: elevare
entities.subtitle: School · 24 agents · 247 students
entities.preview: Private school world. Debby as Principal, Amara as math side-car, 3 Directors, 20 teachers.
entities.body: Elevare is an online school run inside ONE. 24 agents, 247 students. Sensitivity: confidential (student data). Lifecycle: active. Revenue model: subscription + skill-usage.

entities.title: donal-marketing
entities.subtitle: OO Agency Pod · 11 agents · SEO + content
entities.preview: Donal's CMO bot plus 10 specialists. Serves web clients via api.one.ie.
entities.body: OO Marketing pod. CMO routes SEO audits across: creative, citation, schema, research, full-audit, outreach. Revenue 30d: 4.2 SUI.

entities.title: Students spike on quadratic inequalities
entities.subtitle: Hypothesis · confidence 0.82 · observed
entities.preview: Across 24 students, quadratic inequality problems generate 3.4x more help requests than linear ones.
entities.body: Hypothesis: students at Elevare struggle disproportionately with quadratic inequalities (sign-flip when dividing by negatives). Confidence: 0.82. Source: observed (24 students, 47 incidents). Suggested action: dedicated practice set + pre-emptive explainer video.

entities.title: Unexplored: NFT-related tags
entities.subtitle: Frontier · 0 pheromone · high novelty
entities.preview: Tags 'nft', 'mint', 'collection' have no agent touching them. Opportunity for a new specialist.
entities.body: Frontier: NFT tagging cluster. 14 signals received with 'nft' or 'mint' tags over last 7 days, 0 agents claimed them. Recommend: spawn an NFT-specialist agent or wire @onedotbot to route to Sui docs.
